'''joharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylemless|xylemless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylemless|xylemless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| joharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:joharithi|joharithi]] || [[word:johariji|johariji]] || [[word:joharishi|joharishi]] || [[word:johariki|johariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:joharuthuthu|joharuthuthu]] || [[word:joharujuju|joharujuju]] || [[word:joharushushu|joharushushu]] || [[word:joharukuku|joharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:joharuthu|joharuthu]] || [[word:joharuju|joharuju]] || [[word:joharushu|joharushu]] || [[word:joharuku|joharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:joharufthuf|joharufthuf]] || [[word:joharufjuf|joharufjuf]] || [[word:joharufshuf|joharufshuf]] || [[word:joharufkuf|joharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:joharethe|joharethe]] || [[word:johareje|johareje]] || [[word:johareshe|johareshe]] || [[word:johareke|johareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:joharothotho|joharothotho]] || [[word:joharojojo|joharojojo]] || [[word:joharoshosho|joharoshosho]] || [[word:joharokoko|joharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:joharotho|joharotho]] || [[word:joharojo|joharojo]] || [[word:joharosho|joharosho]] || [[word:joharoko|joharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:joharofthof|joharofthof]] || [[word:joharofjof|joharofjof]] || [[word:joharofshof|joharofshof]] || [[word:joharofkof|joharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:joharÃŸfthÃŸf|joharÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfjÃŸf|joharÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfshÃŸf|joharÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfkÃŸf|joharÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:joharÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|joharÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|joharÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|joharÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|joharÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:joharÃŸfthÃŸf|joharÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfjÃŸf|joharÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfshÃŸf|joharÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfkÃŸf|joharÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:joharÃŸfthÃŸf|joharÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfjÃŸf|joharÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfshÃŸf|joharÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:joharÃŸfkÃŸf|joharÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:joharÃḊthÃḊ|joharÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:joharÃḊjÃḊ|joharÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:joharÃḊshÃḊ|joharÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:joharÃḊkÃḊ|joharÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:joharathatha|joharathatha]] || [[word:joharajaja|joharajaja]] || [[word:joharashasha|joharashasha]] || [[word:joharakaka|joharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:joharatha|joharatha]] || [[word:joharaja|joharaja]] || [[word:joharasha|joharasha]] || [[word:joharaka|joharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:joharafthaf|joharafthaf]] || [[word:joharafjaf|joharafjaf]] || [[word:joharafshaf|joharafshaf]] || [[word:joharafkaf|joharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:joharasha|joharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:joharshÃḋasha|joharshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:joharroasha|joharroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:joharmuasha|joharmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:joharyaasha|joharyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojoharnkshÃḋasha|gojoharnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojoharnkroasha|gojoharnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojoharnkmuasha|gojoharnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojoharnkyaasha|gojoharnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:johaharasha|johaharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:johaharshÃḋasha|johaharshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:johaharroasha|johaharroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:johaharmuasha|johaharmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:johaharyaasha|johaharyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojohaharnkshÃḋasha|gojohaharnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojohaharnkroasha|gojohaharnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojohaharnkmuasha|gojohaharnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojohaharnkyaasha|gojohaharnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jehÃḊrasha|jehÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jehÃḊrshÃḋasha|jehÃḊrshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jehÃḊrroasha|jehÃḊrroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jehÃḊrmuasha|jehÃḊrmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jehÃḊryaasha|jehÃḊryaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojehÃḊrnkshÃḋasha|gojehÃḊrnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojehÃḊrnkroasha|gojehÃḊrnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojehÃḊrnkmuasha|gojehÃḊrnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojehÃḊrnkyaasha|gojehÃḊrnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:johfarasha|johfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:johfarshÃḋasha|johfarshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:johfarroasha|johfarroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:johfarmuasha|johfarmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:johfaryaasha|johfaryaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojohfarnkshÃḋasha|gojohfarnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojohfarnkroasha|gojohfarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojohfarnkmuasha|gojohfarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojohfarnkyaasha|gojohfarnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
